examples: Figure this: New York outscored Boston 14-6 in the series and outhit the Red Sox 30-13.
The Lions actually outhit the Sun Devils 12-5, but stranded 13 runners, including seven in scoring position.
Miami outhit the Mets 13-6 but went 2 for 14 with runners in scoring position and stranded 12 overall.
New York, outhit 13-6 in the game, took two of three from the Marlins and has won its first two series for only the second time in 11 years.
